2025-26 Rhode Island Rams Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 16-16 (7-11, 10th in A-10 MBB)

Coach: Archie Miller

PS/G: 69.9 (311th of 365)

PA/G: 68.2 (40th of 365)

SRS: 2.28 (132nd of 365)

SOS: 0.60 (129th of 365)

ORtg: 105.0 (280th of 365)

DRtg: 102.5 (71st of 365)

Preseason Odds: Championship +200000
